evidence.snippet: Resilient, high-accuracy GNSS receivers and inertial systems for demanding industrial applications, known for anti-jamming and anti-spoofing excellence.

Septentrio designs and manufactures multi-frequency multi-constellation GPS/GNSS positioning technology for demanding applications. Reliable centimeter-level positioning enables machine automation improving efficiency and safety. Septentrio provides positioning solutions for industrial applications such as robotics, construction, survey and mapping, maritime, logistics and unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs).

items.notes: GNSS receivers (modules, OEM boards, rugged enclosures) and GNSS/INS systems (with IMU) are the core product lines. 12 products explicitly tagged for UAV application.

evidence.snippet:
EMEA (HQ)
---------
### Belgium
Greenhill Campus
Interleuvenlaan 15i
3001 Leuven, Belgium

Septentrio has its headquarters in Leuven, Belgium and has a world-wide presence with offices in Los Angeles, Shanghai, Seoul and Yokohama as well as numerous partners around the world. To learn more about Septentrio and its [products](https://www.septentrio.com/en/products), visit [septentrio.com](https://mail.inxco.be/t/j-l-xlrjijt-jlkltjze-t/) .

Septentrio designs and manufactures multi-frequency multi-constellation GPS/GNSS positioning technology for demanding applications. Reliable centimeter-level positioning enables machine automation improving efficiency and safety. Septentrio provides positioning solutions for industrial applications such as robotics, construction, survey and mapping, maritime, logistics and unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs).

Designed around demanding requirements for size, weight, power consumption and temperature variation, the AsteRx-i S is ideal for various applications such as inspection with UAV's, UAS photogrammetry, automation, robotics and logistics.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Designs and manufactures GNSS receiver modules, OEM boards, and GNSS/INS sensors that integrate into drones (UAVs), autonomous vehicles, and robots. Sells components to drone OEMs and integrators, not complete drone platforms.

products.notes: 70+ catalogued SKUs; representative selection listed. More products exist on skipped product pages.

ndaa.notes: The compliance page covers only EU environmental directives (WEEE, RoHS, REACH). No mention of NDAA Section 848/889 anywhere in the corpus. Septentrio is a Belgian company.

blue_uas.notes: No mention of DIU Blue UAS Cleared List or Blue sUAS anywhere in the corpus.

evidence.snippet: Septentrio designs, manufactures and sells high-precision, multi-frequency, multi-constellation GNSS receivers for use in demanding applications. Our GPS/GNSS receivers deliver accurate and reliable centimeter-level positioning. They are designed to perform solidly in the most challenging environments and come in different form factors: boards, modules housed receivers and smart antennas.
*   [Septentrio starts mass production of mosaic-G5 modules](/en/company/news/septentrio-starts-mass-production-mosaic-g5-modules)

readiness.notes: Large catalog of 70+ SKUs across modules, OEM boards, and housed receivers. Mass production of mosaic-G5 explicitly announced.

unresolved_questions: NDAA Section 848/889 compliance status not disclosed on fetched pages
Blue UAS listing status not mentioned in corpus

fetch_requests.reason: Environmental compliance page would likely disclose NDAA Section 848/889 compliance, RoHS/REACH status, and other regulatory compliance relevant to US government procurement. Currently neither NDAA nor Blue UAS status can be determined.

tagline: Belgian GNSS/INS receiver and smart-antenna manufacturer in production across modular, board-level, and rugged-box form factors for UAV, autonomous vehicle, and robotics applications. Strong anti-jamming and anti-spoofing positioning claims; limited public evidence on NDAA compliance, Blue UAS certification, or US defense program adoption. Readiness status production-grade across portfolio.
